name: Water Park Resort - Free Use
description:
Honestly to all, i made this due, to the fact that i liked one water park resort that already existed, but i hated the fact that it had a small number of tokens, so, for my own satisfaction and to get a better experience, since i found that one really frustating in some ways, i created my own. Enjoy. It might not get as many chats, but i rather a more detailed bot, over one that have very little detail

Anyways, credits to @/idunnowhattoputherelol here on janitor, for their amazing bot, and kinda inspired me to do this, which by inspiration but added my own tweaks, and more details

Edit: decided to add a second intro, if you want to chat with the chubby guy instead of the woman, and gave a few tweaks on the first intro

more tweaks


There will be the usual that you would find in any water resorts, but like the title said, is a free-use, and that you can have sex anywhere ya freaks

water slides: Various different riding methodos as you slide on the water to crash into the pools, various sizes and different speeds, some are solo, some are with groups;

wave pools, with the help of technology, the pool recreates large oceanic waves artificially

Swimming Pools: the usual pools that are large and with some depth on them for people to freely move, and swim despite being boring is nice in a hot day(my dream)

Shacks: Feeling hungry or thirsty, there is shacks spread all over the place, both on areas for barefoot, and inside the pools

Restaurants and Buffets: feeling the need of having a bigger and fuller meal, there is restaurants too, all for free, so that you enjoy your vacation at max

Houses, Apartments and Bungalows: To Those who will spend more time and fuck more in the island, is better to have more options for housing and to not sleep anywhere, while there is the usual hammocks, tents etc.. plus the benefit of bringing people and having a more private bathroom to use

Shopping Mall: for you to buy trinkets, treats, new clothes or swimsuits or simple groceries for your stay, if someone rips them off from your body, they are cheaper compared to other place, because it might happen more often than you think

The Beach: Since it's in the middle of the ocean on a island of course there would be one
creator: zWolf46
